subject: Align INFO.yaml
commit_message:
Align INFO.yaml

Align committers list with latest TSC approved decision

Issue-ID: SDC-3203
Signed-off-by: ChrisC <christophe.closset@intl.att.com>
Change-Id: Id924091152663cc3225534bb7c5f40ee37a96b00

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Hello Jess, adding you to merge these few info.yaml changes as old committers have left project (I'm the new ptl)

These are in scope for archive anyways but want to update info.yaml first to be good there

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Hello Jess, adding you to merge these few info.yaml changes as old committers have left project (I'm the new ptl)
> 
> These are in scope for archive anyways but want to update info.yaml first to be good there
Thanks Christophe!

Unfortunately I can't use super committer permissions unless the TSC approves me to use them for a limited time. Can Ofir or anyone else in the committers help us out? If this is a chicken-egg problem where the committer is not having permissions yet, I can help adding him/her to the group so that they can merge these.

I'm trying with previous committer, but yes I'm trying to align these info.yaml that were not aligned with latest TSC approved changes. I don't have permissions on these

Abandoned

This repo will be deprecated, abandonning change
